titleStmt.title: SII 23.287: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 287. (A.R. No. 287 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—in the same place Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 4: 1120-21 A.D.

summary.p: The introduction commences with the words Pūmālai miḍaindu. The inscription registers a gift of three mā and odd of vacant land situated on the north wing of the Māḷigaitteru (Street) at Tiruviḍaimarudūr by the Nagarattār of the place, for meeting the expenses of the big annual festival in the temple. Taxes like śilvari and peruvari due on the land were to be met out of the amount deposited in the temple for the purchase of a site for a maṭha for the māhēśvaras, by a native of Iḷaṅgārikuḍi in Pērāvūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭaittu poṉmālai tikaḻap pāmālai malar ntu parumaṇittiraḻpuyattirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jeyamakaḷ puyat tiṉ maraimārvaṉ tanateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷ Orutaniyiruppak kalai makaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟppiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppat ticaitoṟu tekiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvaṉamum kavippator putumatipol veṇkuṭaimimicai niḻaṟṟak karuṅkali mayāṉattu vaṉpalattiṭaik kaṭappa kuḷattiṭait teluṅ kavimaṉ vilaṅka micaiyeṟavuṅ kaliṅkapūmiyaik kaṉa(na)leri parukavum Aympaṭaipparuvattu vempaṭaitā
ṅki vantaruḷi veṅkaimaṇṭalat tāṅkinitiruttu vaṭaticai Aṭipaṭuttaruḷi teṉṟicait tarumamum tavamum tānamum taḻaippa vetamum meym maiyum Ātiyulakampolt talaiciṟappa vantaruḷi velakkarum poṟpuliyāṇai pa maṇimakuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyirk kellām Iṉṉuyirt tāypol kaṇṇoḷi parappi maṇmuḻutuṅ kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttu tan koyil koṟṟavācalppuṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅka muracukiṉamu vicaiyamum pukaḻum melmeloṅ kac ceḻiyar veñcuram pukac ceralar kaṭalpuka
Aḻitaru ciṅkaḷarañci neñcalamarak kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kaṉnaṭar veṉ niṭak koṅkarotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟum Etticaimaṉ na(ṉa)ruṉ taṉtamakkaraṇeṉa tirumalarc cevaṭi Urimaiyi liṟaiñcit to vāṇicai mukkokkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭum caṅkaraṉ Imaiyat ticaiyat tiruntaṉaneṉap porunti yuṭaniruppa Āṅkavaṉ makiḻum kaṅkaiyoppākiya terivaiyartilataṉ tiyākapatākai purikulam maṭap piṭi puṉitakuṇavanitai tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷivaṉ tiruvuḷḷat taruḷ muḻutumuṭaiyāḷeṉa vuṭaniṟp
pac cempoṉ virasiṁhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvanacakravarttikaḷ śrīvikrama coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār tevatāṉam nakaram tiruviṭaimarutu nakarattom Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār mūla viruttikar caṇḍeśvaradevarkku nāṅkaḷ peruntiruvā nāṅkaḷ Iṟai yili ceytukuṭutta natta nilattukku piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ūril māḷikai
tteruvil vaṭaciṟakil nilam 3pa3ma Innilam muṉṟumā mukkāṇikkum kiḻpāṅkellai Ālantūruṭaiyān kaṇavati tevan maṉaikku meṟkun tenpāṟkellai teruvukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tiru vuṭaimarutuṭaiyār tirukkopuram rājentracoḻa n=tiruvācalil niṉṟun teṟkunokki nakaratteru veṟappona teruvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār tevatāṉamāṉa tiruviṭaimarutumāṉakaram Irunta maṉaikku teṟkkum vaṭakkil taḷic ceriyil te
nciṟakil vāniḷat talaiveli Ellaikkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta peru nāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nattanilam 3pa3ma Innilam muṉṟumāmuk kāṇiyum Immulaviruttiyar caṇḍeśvaradevaṟkku kiḻakkilum mākak kuṭuttu Iṟaiyiliyataiyañ ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉ nāṭ ṭup perāvūrnāṭṭu Iḷaṅkārikuṭi Iḷaṅkārikuṭaiyārāṉa tevaṉ māheśvaraṟku peru
ntiruvāṭṭiyeṉṉum perāl tirumaṭattukku maṉaikoḷḷa Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār śrī paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa vitattāril nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu Ikkācu Aympattañcum Āvaṇakkaḷiyai kaic cellakkoṇṭu Innilam muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyālum vanta peruvari cilvari Eppeṟpaṭṭatum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka Immulaviruttikar caṇḍe śvaradevaṟku Iṟaiyiliyataiyañ ceytukuṭuttom tiruviṭaimarutu nakarattom nakaram paṇikka nakarakkaṇakku laneccūr
ruṭaiyaān marutamāṇikkam pavaḻakkuṉṟineṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu māṅkuṭaiyān Āṭavalāṉ cotiviḷakkaṉ sajñaiyātanamaikku Āṉaiccūruṭaiyān marutamāṇikkam pavaḻakkuṉṟineṉ Ivai Eṉne ḻuttu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilukku śrī kāriyañ ceykiṟa koṇṭaluṭaiyāneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu Ik koyil civabrāhmaṇaṉ kaucikan periyāḻvāneṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai paṇṇaiyūrkiḻavan tevaṉ maṇavāḷaneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu Ip
paṭi Aṟiveṉ Ik koyilil civabrāhmaṇan marukatāyaṉ maruntu Uyyaṉinṟāṭuvān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven poṉna nampiyāna Ari tāramaṅkalamuṭaiyāneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vāsudevan periyānāna veṇkūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
